info.description: Public REST API exposed by the gateway. Internal microservices communicate only over gRPC and are intentionally omitted from this specification.
info.title: Project Management Gateway API

post.description: Authenticates a user by email and password and returns a JWT access token.

get.description: Returns JWT claims of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a regular user account and returns a JWT access token.

get.description: Builds CSV, XLSX or PDF management reports from project and payment calendar data. Regular users receive only their projects; administrators may export the whole portfolio.

parameters.description: Report type: summary, projects, payments, cashflow, profit or risks
parameters.name: reportType

parameters.description: File format: csv, xlsx or pdf
parameters.name: format

parameters.description: Lower payment planned date bound in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: date_from

parameters.description: Upper payment planned date bound in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: date_to

parameters.description: Payment status: planned, paid or cancelled
parameters.name: payment_status

get.description: Returns a payment by ID. Accessible to administrators, the project manager, and active project members.

put.description: Updates a payment. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

delete.description: Deletes a payment. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

post.description: Marks a planned payment as paid and stores the actual payment date.

get.description: Calls downstream services and returns their availability status from the gateway perspective.
Returns a project event by ID. Accessible to administrators, the project manager, and active project members.

put.description: Updates a project event. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

delete.description: Deletes a project event. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

get.description: Returns a project member by ID. Accessible to administrators, the project manager, and active project members.

put.description: Updates project member attributes. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

delete.description: Deletes a project member. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

get.description: Returns a project stage by ID. Accessible to administrators, the project manager, and active project members.

put.description: Updates a project stage. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

delete.description: Deletes a project stage. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

get.description: Returns projects visible to the caller. Administrators may use the participant filter, regular users see only their own related projects.

post.description: Creates a project. Accessible only to administrators and managers. Managers may create projects only for themselves.

get.description: Returns a project by ID. Accessible to administrators, the project manager, and active project members.

put.description: Updates a project. Accessible to administrators and the current project manager.

delete.description: Deletes a project. Accessible to administrators and the current project manager.

get.description: Returns project events. Accessible to administrators, the project manager, and active project members.

post.description: Creates a project event. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

get.description: Returns project members. Accessible to administrators, the project manager, and active project members.

post.description: Adds a user to a project team. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

get.description: Returns planned, paid and computed overdue totals for a project.
Returns project payment calendar entries visible to the caller.

parameters.description: Stored payment status: planned, paid or cancelled
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Lower planned date bound in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: date_from

parameters.description: Upper planned date bound in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: date_to

post.description: Creates a planned income or expense for a project. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

get.description: Returns all stages of a project. Accessible to administrators, the project manager, and active project members.

post.description: Creates a stage inside a project. Accessible to administrators and the project manager.

get.description: Returns a daily report comment by ID. Accessible to users who can read the parent report.

put.description: Updates a daily report comment. Accessible to the comment author and administrators.

delete.description: Deletes a daily report comment. Accessible to the comment author and administrators.

get.description: Returns a daily report entry by ID. Accessible to the report author, administrators, and reviewers with access to the parent report.

put.description: Updates a daily report entry. Accessible to the report author while the parent report remains editable.

delete.description: Deletes a daily report entry. Accessible to the report author while the parent report remains editable.

get.description: Returns daily reports visible to the caller. Regular users list their own reports, managers may request `scope=review` to see reviewable reports, and administrators can list all reports.

parameters.description: Listing scope. Use `self` for own reports or `review` for manager review queue.
parameters.name: scope

parameters.description: User ID filter. Available to administrators, or must match the current user for `scope=self`.
parameters.name: user_id

parameters.description: Lower bound for report date in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: date_from

parameters.description: Upper bound for report date in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: date_to

post.description: Creates a daily report. Regular users can create reports only for themselves, administrators may specify another user via `user_id`.

get.description: Returns a daily report by ID. Accessible to the report author, administrators, and project managers reviewing related project work.

put.description: Updates a daily report. Authors may edit draft or submitted report fields they own, while administrators and reviewers may set review statuses such as `approved` or `rejected`.

delete.description: Deletes a daily report. Accessible to the report author and administrators.

get.description: Returns comments attached to a daily report. Accessible to users who can read the report.

post.description: Adds a comment to a daily report. Accessible to users who can read the report, including the author, administrators, and reviewers.

get.description: Returns all entries that belong to a daily report. Accessible to the report author, administrators, and reviewers with access to the report.

post.description: Adds a worklog entry to a daily report. Accessible to the report author while the report remains editable.

get.description: Returns all user profiles. This endpoint is available only to administrators.

post.description: Creates a new user, manager or administrator account. This endpoint is available only to administrators.

get.description: Returns a user profile by ID. Administrators can read any profile, regular users can read only their own profile.

put.description: Updates a user profile. Administrators can update any profile, regular users can update only their own profile.

delete.description: Deletes a user in both auth-service and user-service. This endpoint is available only to administrators.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token. Use the `Bearer {token}` format.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
